lineage.Process: CopyFeatures N:\FFSL\Data\BuildingPoly\building_polys.shp N:\FFSL\HRWUI\HRWUI.gdb\building_polys # # # #

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.5.0'><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>building_polys</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><DeleteField><field_name>Shape_Leng</field_name></DeleteField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>FalsePositive</field_name><field_type>SHORT</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required><field_domain>NoYes</field_domain></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>FalseNegative</field_name><field_type>SHORT</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required><field_domain>NoYes</field_domain></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>NeedReview</field_name><field_type>SHORT</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required><field_domain>NoYes</field_domain></AddField></workflow><workflow><AddField><field_name>Notes</field_name><field_type>TEXT</field_type><field_length>255</field_length><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>

UpdateSchema "CIMDATA=<CIMStandardDataConnection xsi:type='typens:CIMStandardDataConnection' xmlns:xsi='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance' xmlns:xs='http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema' xmlns:typens='http://www.esri.com/schemas/ArcGIS/3.5.0'><WorkspaceFactory>FileGDB</WorkspaceFactory><Dataset>building_polys</Dataset><DatasetType>esriDTFeatureClass</DatasetType></CIMStandardDataConnection>" <operationSequence><workflow><AddField><field_name>Size</field_name><field_type>DOUBLE</field_type><field_is_nullable>True</field_is_nullable><field_is_required>False</field_is_required></AddField></workflow></operationSequence>
CalculateField building_polys_Layer Size !shape.area@SQUAREFEET! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField building_polys_Layer Size 0 PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField building_polys_Layer Size !shape.area@SQUAREFEET! PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField building_polys_Layer Size round(!shape.area@SQUAREFEET!, 2) PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField building_polys_Layer FalsePositive 0 PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField building_polys_Layer FalseNegative 0 PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField building_polys_Layer NeedReview 0 PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField building_polys_Layer Size round(!shape.area@SQUAREFEET!, 2) PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField building_polys_Layer Size round(!shape.area@SQUAREFEET!, 2) PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField building_polys_Layer Size round(!shape.area@SQUAREFEET!, 2) PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField building_polys_Layer Size round(!shape.area@SQUAREFEET!, 2) PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField building_polys_Layer Size round(!shape.area@SQUAREFEET!, 2) PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField building_polys_Layer Size round(!shape.area@SQUAREFEET!, 2) PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField building_polys_Layer FalseNegative 1 PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField building_polys_Layer FalseNegative 1 PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField building_polys_Layer FalseNegative 1 PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField building_polys_Layer FalseNegative 1 PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS
CalculateField building_polys_Layer FalseNegative 1 PYTHON3 # TEXT NO_ENFORCE_DOMAINS

ExportFeatures Building_Polys\building_polys C:\Users\dsjohnson\Documents\ArcGIS\Projects\WUI_highrisk_structure\FFSL\Data\20260409\HRWUI_building_polys_dsjohnson.shp # NOT_USE_ALIAS "Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Building_Polys\building_polys,Shape_Length,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Building_Polys\building_polys,Shape_Area,-1,-1;Size "Size SQ Ft" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,Building_Polys\building_polys,Size,-1,-1;FalsePositive "False Positive" true true false 2 Short 0 0,First,#,Building_Polys\building_polys,FalsePositive,-1,-1;FalseNegative "False Negative" true true false 2 Short 0 0,First,#,Building_Polys\building_polys,FalseNegative,-1,-1;NeedReview "Need Review" true true false 2 Short 0 0,First,#,Building_Polys\building_polys,NeedReview,-1,-1;Notes "Notes" true true false 255 Text 0 0,First,#,Building_Polys\building_polys,Notes,0,254" #
Clip HRWUI_building_polys_dsjohnson Counties C:\Users\mtveit\Downloads\FFSL\HRWUI_Map\HRWUI.gdb\dsjohnson #

ExportFeatures dsjohnson C:\Users\mtveit\Downloads\Johnson_Weber\Johnson_Weber.shp # NOT_USE_ALIAS "Shape_Leng "Shape_Leng" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,dsjohnson,Shape_Leng,-1,-1;Size "Size" true true false 8 Double 0 0,First,#,dsjohnson,Size,-1,-1;FalsePosit "FalsePosit" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,dsjohnson,FalsePosit,-1,-1;FalseNegat "FalseNegat" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,dsjohnson,FalseNegat,-1,-1;NeedReview "NeedReview" true true false 4 Long 0 0,First,#,dsjohnson,NeedReview,-1,-1;Notes "Notes" true true false 254 Text 0 0,First,#,dsjohnson,Notes,0,253;Shape_Length "Shape_Length" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,dsjohnson,Shape_Length,-1,-1;Shape_Area "Shape_Area" false true true 8 Double 0 0,First,#,dsjohnson,Shape_Area,-1,-1" #

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: Area of feature in internal units squared.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated.
